nodes.name: Buff-winged cinclodes
nodes.summary: Buff-winged cinclodes（Buff-winged cinclodes，学名 Cinclodes fuscus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、灌丛。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 智利
nodes.summary: 智利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联200种鸟类，包括北山䳍、南山䳍、凤头䳍等200种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 巴拉圭

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The buff-winged cinclodes (Cinclodes fuscus) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Paraguay, Uruguay and as a vagrant on the Falkland Islands.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The buff-winged cinclodes is found year-round in central and southern Chile and most of central and southern Argentina including Tierra del Fuego, and as a migrant to northern Argentina, southern Brazil, southeastern Paraguay, and Uruguay. It has also been recorded as a vagrant on the Falkland Islands. It inhabits a variety of open habitats, most of them grassy such as páramo, puna, and temperate grasslands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The buff-winged cinclodes is found year-round in central and southern Chile and most of central and southern Argentina including Tierra del Fuego, and as a migrant to northern Argentina, southern Brazil, southeastern Paraguay, and Uruguay. It has also been recorded as a vagrant on the Falkland Islands. It inhabits a variety of open habitats, most of them grassy such as páramo, puna, and temperate grasslands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also occurs in arid montane scrublands, on Patagonian steppes and beaches, and in open Patagonian woodlands
